title: Contact Us
description: Get in touch with Drivon for any questions about our racing gear, orders, or partnerships. We're here to help!

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help. Reach out to our team for assistance with orders, product information, or anything else.

subject.label: Subject
subject.placeholder: What can we help you with?

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: We typically ship orders within 1-2 business days. Domestic shipping takes 3-5 business days, while international shipping takes 7-14 business days.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. Returns are free for domestic customers.

items.question: Do you offer international shipping?
items.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide! International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order in your account dashboard.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for international orders.

items.question: Do you have a size guide?
items.answer: Yes! Check our size guide page for detailed measurements and fitting instructions for all our racing gear.
